name: Spicey Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except wings and black pepper.
2. Microwave on high for 4 minutes, stirring once.
3. Remove skin from wings using a sharp knife.
4. Place wings in a single layer in an 11 x 7-inch baking pan.
5. Sprinkle with black pepper.
6. Spoon half the sauce over the wings.
7. Microwave on High for 6 minutes.
8. Turn wings and spoon remaining sauce over wings.
9. Continue microwaving on high for another 6 minutes, or until juices run clear when skin is pricked with a fork.
10. To prepare dip, combine all ingredients in a small bowl.
